title: YBK Tech Cute Ceramic Rabbit Bowl for Easter or Daily Use (6.7 Inches)
features: High quality lead-free ceramic, strengthen porcelain.
Cute rabbit design, novelty and stylish. Good for Easter or daily use.
Bowl size: 6.7inches (length)* 5inches (width)* 1.9inches (height), including the rabbit part. Irregular shaped, please double check the size before buying. Thank you!
The 6.7Inch bowl is quite tiny, can be used to serve sauce, seasoning or small bowl of rice. Good for children too.
description: Features: The bowl is of good quality, made of strengthen porcelain, it is simple but stylish. The rabbit design of the bowl is quite adorable. It’s quite easy to wash. Dishwasher safe and microwave safe too. Specifications: Color: as shown in the pictures. Style: cartoon Material: lead-free strengthen porcelain Bowl size: 6.7inches* 5inches* 1.9inches(refers to the overall length and overall width, including the rabbit part, kindly refer to the 2nd photo on this page for size details) Weight: 255g Tips: * The 6.7Inch bowl is quite tiny, can be used to serve sauce, seasoning or small bowl of rice. Good for children too. * Slight flaw may exist in single product as they are handicraft products. It’s not a quality issue. * In order to prevent skidding, the bottom of the plate is not glazed. * The plate is microwave and dishwasher safe. But be careful not to burn yourself when carrying the plate from the microwave. *The plates are not thick. Be aware if you’re looking for thick ones. We try to pack it well so that it arrives at your hand in good condition. But if (in case) there are any delivery damages, please kindly email us with a photo showing the fault, and we will not hesitate to resolve it for you. Thank you! Package includes: 1* bowl
